title: sideritis spinulosa subsp. subspinosa
intro: Sideritis spinulosa subsp. subspinosa is a subspecies of the Sideritis spinulosa plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant is also known as Mountain tea or Ironwort, and it is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis spinulosa subsp. subspinosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing protection against certain diseases due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically dried and used as a tea or infusion, or added to capsules and tinctures for further medicinal use.
